title: Ecclesiastes
content:
There is one sin: to call a green leaf grey,
    Whereat the sun in heaven shuddereth.
    There is one blasphemy: for death to pray,
    For God alone knoweth the praise of death.

    There is one creed: 'neath no world-terror's wing
    Apples forget to grow on apple-trees.
    There is one thing is needful--everything--
    The rest is vanity of vanities.
meaning:
"Ecclesiastes" is a quintessential example of Gilbert Keith Chesterton's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
